

PS C:\Users\GARGI KALEKAR\downloads> chmod 400 "fs-key.pem"


PS C:\Users\GARGI KALEKAR\downloads> ssh -i "fs-key.pem" ubuntu@ec2-3-88-170-34.compute-1.amazonaws.com


ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ ls
ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ cd home/ubuntu


ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ ls
index.html

ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ sudo chmod 644 index.html
ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ sudo apt install nginx

ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ sudo systemctl start nginx
ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ sudo systemctl enable nginx

ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ sudo systemctl status nginx



ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ sudo mv index.html /var/www/html/
ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-105:~$ exit
logout
Connection to ec2-3-88-170-34.compute-1.amazonaws.com closed.
PS C:\Users\GARGI KALEKAR\downloads> 


sudo chmod 644 index.html
